info.name: SDIA for Zero Trust Architecture — Validation
info.description: SDIA semantic routing — Zero Trust pattern. 24 endpoints. 6 domains. Full conversion chain. Prior Art: IPCOM000277630D | DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18877636
